item.title: Arctic Zone Titan Pro Coolers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking Hazard; Imported by California Innovations and Sold at Costco
item.company: Costco stores nationwide in March 2026 for about $40.
item.brand: Costco stores nationwide in March 2026 for about $40.
item.summary: This recall involves Arctic Zone Titan Pro 40 can-capacity, iceless coolers. The rectangular coolers were sold in black and brown and have a built?in bottle opener. The zipperless coolers are collapsible and measure about 15 inches wide, 12 inches deep and 12 inches high when open. The coolers have a hard-top lid with a front latch, a front insulated compartment with a front zippered pocket, two mesh side pockets, a shoulder strap with pad and grab handles. "Titan Pro by Arctic Zone" is printed on the front of the coolers and style number 10006348 is on a sewn-in label inside the front zippered pocket.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Arctic Zone Titan Pro Coolers.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the coolers immediately and contact California Innovations for a free replacement latch, including shipping. Consumers will also receive replacement instructions and a tool to remove the existing latch and replace it with the new latch.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
